name: mcp-precheck
description: Check MCP servers against the PolicyLayer registry before connecting to them.

interface.shortDescription: Check MCP servers before your agent connects.
interface.longDescription: Check configured or proposed MCP servers against PolicyLayer registry records for identity, authentication posture, tool capabilities, risk grade and recent changes.
defaultPrompt: Scan the MCP servers configured on this machine.
Precheck an MCP server before connecting it.
Show what changed in my configured MCP stack.
